query:
UPDATE receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN productConversions pc ON pc.productId = roi.productId AND pc.tenantId = roi.tenantId
SET roi.expectedQuantity = ROUND(roi.expectedQuantity * pc.factorToBase),
    roi.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE roi.tenantId = 30001
  AND roi.receivedQuantity = 0
  AND roi.expectedQuantity < pc.factorToBase
  AND pc.factorToBase > 1;
